case_title: YODIT T. MENDER RESPONDENT VS. YONAS G. ASSEFAW APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2003 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-21-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 504.
